articles.title: OUTPUTS
articles.summary: When AI can see your team's research, feedback, and strategic decisions in one place, it produces insights that actually move product development forward.

articles.title: Register for the free masterclass series
BUILDERS, SOLVERS, AND CYNICS
articles.summary: Builders value constraints. Solvers try to remove them. Now a third group - the Cynics - equates honesty with authenticity and glorifies skepticism. Their alliance with Solvers fuels anti-tech sentiment, while those who embrace uncertainty keep driving real progress.

articles.title: A HISTORICAL TAKE ON THE AI BOOM
articles.summary: AI is today's App Store moment - overhyped now but soon essential. When the dust settles, lasting value will come from PMs who solve real problems, not just chase the buzz.

articles.title: WHY YOU HATE YOUR PRODUCT JOB (AND IT'S NOT WHAT YOU THINK)
articles.summary: You don't hate product work - you're just playing the wrong game. Pick the environment that fits your strengths, and your skills will finally shine.

articles.title: A VERY OBVIOUS DEAL
articles.summary: Slack's pay-for-what-you-use model transformed software pricing and shaped today's usage-based economy. Yet it also exposed a paradox: customers resist paying for digital tasks that don't seem expensive, forcing modern SaaS companies to tie prices to tangible costs or partner with those who can monetize them.

articles.title: AI MONETIZATION STRATEGIES FROM A16Z
articles.summary: In this live webinar with Metronome [9], Martin Casado, General Partner at Andreessen Horowitz, will share how both startups and public companies are shifting from subscriptions to results-based, hybrid monetization for AI, and how emerging leaders are building

articles.title: their Monetization Operating Models. Join live on November 4th
HOW TO MANAGE FALSE RUMORS AS A HIGH PERFORMER
articles.summary: High performers can attract jealous rumors. Reacting defensively only fuels them. Instead, stay calm, ignore the noise, and prove the opposite through clear, visible actions that tell a stronger story.

articles.title: THE RISE OF CONTEXTUAL AI: HOW MIRO AND AMPLITUDE ARE MAKING PRODUCTS THAT ACTUALLY UNDERSTAND YOU
articles.summary: Generic AI is done. The future belongs to contextual AI - tools that understand behavior and work alongside people to turn data into insight and creativity into growth.

articles.title: ACCESSIBLE DESIGN VS. INCLUSIVE DESIGN: WHAT'S THE DIFFERENCE?
articles.summary: Accessibility lets people use a product. Inclusion makes them feel it's for them. True inclusive design does both.

articles.title: RETENTION IN CONSUMER PRODUCTS
articles.summary: User retention isn't about marketing, it's about building habits. Apps that succeed balance intrinsic motivation with thoughtful extrinsic levers. Keep users returning because they want to, not because you keep reminding them.

articles.title: WE HAVE TO SIMPLIFY!
articles.summary: When leaders say “we need to simplify,” they rarely mean the same thing.

articles.title: IN SYNC: THE HIDDEN RHYTHMS THAT SHAPE US
articles.summary: We sync with those around us, just like metronomes on the same table.
